directive_executed.title: Implement PROP-072 — hoist Step 4c (PROP-066 helper invocation) to FIRST position in workspace-sync Step 4 collapsed bash block
steps_completed: Step 1: Hoisted 4c sub-block (sync-workspace-step4c.js invocation + sentinel git-add/commit/push) from middle position to FIRST position immediately after trap setup. Order is now: trap -> 4c -> 4a -> FILES_COMMITTED capture -> 4b -> rm $CLONE.

Step 2: Updated 'Ordering inside the block matters' prose bullet list to reflect new order. Added correctness argument: 4c reads origin/main; 4a writes FUSE->git; disjoint data so reorder is correctness-preserving. Noted side-benefit: 4c may fast-forward local clone, improving 4a push success rate.

Step 3: Extended AGENT_NOTES guidance comment to instruct LLM to include literal 'step4c-not-invoked' if no sync-workspace-runs sentinel was created this cycle (compares SENTINEL_COUNT_THIS_CYCLE bash variable captured pre-add). Turns silent-skip regressions into visible run-report soft-complaints.
Step 4: Verification: grep -q '4c FIRST per PROP-072' monitor/prompts/workspace-sync.md returned 0 (FIXED). Marker count: 3 occurrences (header comment + sub-section comment + prose reference).
Step 5: Single commit pushed (post-rebase SHA: 4177f601dc3245f4ee4c74d7df9e1563efa1990d). Commit message references DIRECTIVE-012 + PROP-072 + FIRST/LAST/MIDDLE positional finding.
Step 6: workspace-sync.md mirrored to FUSE (md5 verified equal). Next scheduled workspace-sync cycle (top of hour) will pick up new ordering.

Step 7: PROP-072.json flipped status=implemented + implementation_commit + implementation_at + implementation_run + implementation_directive fields recorded. DIRECTIVE-20260531-012.json flipped status=completed + completed_at + completed_by_run + prop_id_implemented + implementation_commit fields recorded. SHA correction follow-up commit applied post-rebase.

Step 8: Canary plan documented in PROP-072 lifecycle commit message — 2 consecutive sentinels in 2 cycles = primary fix confirmed; next non-directive tinker Mode 2 should grep run-reports for 'step4c-not-invoked' (expect 0).
